title: pragmata
shortDescription: Pragmata is a unique, sci-fi action-adventure game from Capcom. Follow Hugh, a member of an ill-fated investigation team, and Diana, a young android, as they navigate a lunar facility taken over by rogue AI in search of a way to Earth.
detailedDescriptionHtml:
"Wherever you go, I'll be there."


Pragmata is a unique, sci-fi action-adventure game from Capcom.

Follow Hugh, a member of an ill-fated investigation team, and Diana, a young android, as they navigate a lunar facility taken over by rogue AI in search of a way to Earth.

ONE TRAGIC ACCIDENT. AN UNLIKELY DUO.


At a remote lunar research facility, humanity discovers a new ore—one that, when properly refined, can be used to create almost anything using 3D printers.

When the facility suddenly falls silent, Hugh and his team are dispatched to investigate...but then disaster strikes.

Hugh is saved by Diana, a lone android wandering the complex. The two of them must join forces to find a way off the moon while working their way through an AI-controlled facility bent on stopping them.



Half-realized replicas of human civilization sprawl across the lunar surface, while inside, only scattered traces of the facility's vanished inhabitants remain. What buried truth awaits at the end of Hugh and Diana's journey?

TAKE CONTROL OF TWO CHARACTERS—AT THE SAME TIME.


Guide both Hugh as he moves, shoots, and jumps, and Diana, who hacks at the same time.

Enjoy a fresh, new blend of gameplay in this truly unique system that will push your brain to its limits.

supportedLanguagesHtml:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Arabic, Spanish - Latin America*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Polish, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese, Japanese*, Korean*
*languages with full audio support

pcRequirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 11 (64 bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-8500 / AMD Ryzen 5 3500
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660 6 GB / Radeon RX 5500 XT 8 GB
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 40 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Estimated performance when set to "Performance" preset: 1080p/45 fps. Framerate might drop in graphics-intensive scenes. SSD recommended.
pcRequirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 11 (64 bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i7-8700 / AMD Ryzen 5 5500
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2060 Super 8GB / Radeon RX 6600 8GB
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 40 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: Estimated performance when set to "Balanced" preset: 1080p/60 fps. Frame rate might drop in graphics-intensive scenes. AMD Radeon RX 6700 XT 12GB or NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3060 12GB required to support ray tracing. SSD recommended.

newsItems.title: Полиция Дианы: Capcom рассказала, как создавался образ девочки-андроида в Pragmata
newsItems.author: Семен Страндов
newsItems.contents: В процессе создания Pragmata разработчики из Capcom уделяли повышенное внимание формированию характера и образа андроида Дианы, вокруг которой строится сюжетная линия приключенческой игры. Поскольку внешне и по поведению персонаж представляет собой ребенка, разработчикам пришлось много думать о том, как найти нужный баланс — изобразить Диану максимально живой, но при этом не вызывающей у игрока сильных отрицательных эмоций.

newsItems.title: To make Pragmata's Diana feel naturally childlike, a small group of women dubbed the "Diana Police" was set up to keep things in check
newsItems.contents:
Despite being a dad game, a pseudo-genre that has its fair share of problems in the way it depicts father-child relationships, Pragmata generally seemed to approach all of this fairly well. The consensus seems to be that space man Hugh was genuinely kind of a nice guy, and that his relationship with Diana was actually quite sweet. But as it turns out, the game's lead devs had to get a bit of a helping hand in writing Diana specifically, resulting in a group of women coming in to help as part of the "Diana Police."

Read more

newsItems.title: New Title Update adds Hugh's Scribble Suit!
newsItems.author: capcomjapan_marketing
newsItems.contents:
Pragmata's latest title update adds Hugh's Scribble Suit from the Sketchbook demo, as well as adjustments to the difficulty for Training Simulation 30 Stand or Die. Text errors in the game have also been fixed.

Check out the music video for Pragmata's theme song, ""Memories Are You"".
[previewyoutube=EWXhdXPwBoU;full][/previewyoutube]
Thank you for your continued support of Pragmata!

https://store.steampowered.com/app/3357650/PRAGMATA/

newsItems.title: Только командная работа: Президент Capcom рассказал, как компания создает сегодня новые игры, которые становятся хитами
newsItems.author: Семен Страндов
newsItems.contents: Современный подход Capcom к созданию новых игр отрицает диктатуру авторитета одного-единственного автора. Вместо этого внутри компании культивируются идеи командной работы — разные специалисты из разных отделов объединяют усилия для того, чтобы вместе принимать ключевые технические, дизайнерские и художественные решения. Об этом рассказал президент издательства Харухиро Цудзимото.

newsItems.title: Пока другие студии увольняют сотрудников, Capcom активно расширяется и нанимает новых разработчиков
newsItems.author: Семен Страндов
newsItems.contents: Capcom продолжает расширять свой штат, о чём сообщила инвесторам в новом финансовом отчёте. Компания сохраняет курс на последовательное привлечение большого количества сотрудников, включая молодых специалистов.
